props_visible: Live or taxidermied falcon perched on traditional mounting perch above lantern

notable_visual_elements: Falcon — Saudi national symbol, hunting heritage, ultimate prestige signifier
Falcon perched over lantern = dual heritage symbols in one frame
Traditional kilim textile = Najdi heritage craft
Edison bulb warmth creates intimate mood
No food visible — purely atmospheric/decor storytelling

hospitality_cues: Falcon in restaurant decor = prestige hospitality (falcon ownership is Saudi elite status symbol)
Traditional lantern + kilim = Najdi aesthetic heritage
cultural_notes.free_notes: The falcon is arguably the single most potent Saudi cultural symbol — it appears on the national emblem, represents hunting heritage of the Arabian Peninsula, and connotes prestige/nobility. Including a live or mounted falcon in the restaurant decor is a deliberate statement: this is not just food, it is an immersive Najdi heritage experience. No food is shown — this post sells atmosphere, not product.

pattern_matches.notes: Falcon as singular cultural hero object — Saudi symbol of prestige and heritage
Decor storytelling without food — selling the ambiance and cultural identity of the space
